'''鈭歴h-t-d-k''' ('''kashatdekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fodder|fodder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-t-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fodder|fodder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-t-d-k
|-
! Lemma
| kashatdekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishatdekoko|thishatdekoko]] || [[word:jishatdekoko|jishatdekoko]] || [[word:shishatdekoko|shishatdekoko]] || [[word:kishatdekoko|kishatdekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushatdekoko|thuthushatdekoko]] || [[word:jujushatdekoko|jujushatdekoko]] || [[word:shushushatdekoko|shushushatdekoko]] || [[word:kukushatdekoko|kukushatdekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushatdekoko|thushatdekoko]] || [[word:jushatdekoko|jushatdekoko]] || [[word:shushatdekoko|shushatdekoko]] || [[word:kushatdekoko|kushatdekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushatdekoko|thushatdekoko]] || [[word:jushatdekoko|jushatdekoko]] || [[word:shushatdekoko|shushatdekoko]] || [[word:kushatdekoko|kushatdekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshatdekoko|theshatdekoko]] || [[word:jeshatdekoko|jeshatdekoko]] || [[word:sheshatdekoko|sheshatdekoko]] || [[word:keshatdekoko|keshatdekoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshatdekoko|thoshatdekoko]] || [[word:joshatdekoko|joshatdekoko]] || [[word:shoshatdekoko|shoshatdekoko]] || [[word:koshatdekoko|koshatdekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshatdekoko|thoshatdekoko]] || [[word:joshatdekoko|joshatdekoko]] || [[word:shoshatdekoko|shoshatdekoko]] || [[word:koshatdekoko|koshatdekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shatdekoko|th忙shatdekoko]] || [[word:j忙shatdekoko|j忙shatdekoko]] || [[word:sh忙shatdekoko|sh忙shatdekoko]] || [[word:k忙shatdekoko|k忙shatdekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashatdekoko|thathashatdekoko]] || [[word:jajashatdekoko|jajashatdekoko]] || [[word:shashashatdekoko|shashashatdekoko]] || [[word:kakashatdekoko|kakashatdekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashatdekoko|thashatdekoko]] || [[word:jashatdekoko|jashatdekoko]] || [[word:shashatdekoko|shashatdekoko]] || [[word:kashatdekoko|kashatdekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashatdekoko|thashatdekoko]] || [[word:jashatdekoko|jashatdekoko]] || [[word:shashatdekoko|shashatdekoko]] || [[word:kashatdekoko|kashatdekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
